account_id.description: Harvest account ID, sent as the Harvest-Account-Id header on every request.

api_token.description: Harvest personal access token, sent as a Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: Harvest API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects updated at or after this time are read on a fresh sync.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
